title: Notification No.108/2007-Cus(NT), dated 17.10.2007
text: [ TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY, PART II, SECTION 3, SUB SECTION (ii) ] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINITRY OF FINANCE (DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE) Notification No.108 / 2007-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 17th October, 2007. 25 Asvina, 1929 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Central Excise and Customs, Surat-1 to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on (i) The Commissioner of Customs (Export Promotion), New Customs House, Mumbai (ii) The Commissioner of Customs, (Import), New Custom House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai (iii) The Commissioner of Customs, Chatrapaati Shivaji International Airport, Mumbai (iv) The Commissioner of Customs, Custom House Port Area, Visakhapatnam (v) The Commissioner of Customs, (Preventive), Jamnagar (vi) The Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Kandla (vii) The Maritime Commissioner, Mumbai (viii) The Additional Commissioner of Customs (Port Import), Custom House, Chennai (ix) The Additional Commissioner of Customs Chennai Airport and Air Cargo, Chennai (x) The Joint Commissioner of Customs (Import), Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva (xi) The Joint Commissioner of Customs (Port), Custom House, Kolkata (xii) The Joint Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Jamnagar (xiii) The Joint Commissioner of Customs, Customs House Port Area, Vishakhapatnam (xiv) The Joint Commissioner of Customs, New Custom House, Mangalore and (xv) The Deputy Commissioner of Customs, Chatrapati Shivaji International Airport, Mumbai -- 1 of 2 -- for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s Abdulla Textiles, M/s A.C. Fabrics, M/s Imtiyaz Traders, M/s Salim & Company, M/s A.M.Overseas, M/s Novelty Impex, M/s R.N.Impex, M/s Regal Textiles, owned or managed or controlled by Chakkiwala Brothers issued, vide, F.No. DRI/SRU/INV-02/2005, dated the 20th April, 2007, by the Additional Director General, Directorate General of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Rupen Bungalow, Nr. Jain Merchant Society, Paldi, Ahmedabad - 380 007. [F.No. 437/38/2007-Cus.IV] (Aseem Kumar) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 2 of 2 --
